ground_truth.title: 11 Best Social Media Marketing Agencies in 2025
ground_truth.author: Chris Toy
ground_truth.main_content:
Billions of people are active on social media today, and many of them use it to research brands and make buying decisions. As social media's reach and influence continue to grow, this marketing channel will only become more important for businesses looking to generate leads and boost sales. Still, achieving significant traffic and engagement requires specific expertise. If you can't hire a dedicated social media manager or team, working with an agency is your best option. Social media agencies can give you fast access to a diverse team of experts with proven tactics, social media management tools, and the necessary experience to handle social media campaigns at any scale.

To help you choose the best social media marketing agency for your business, we've put together a list of 11 top-rated options. You'll learn about their services, case studies, pricing, and potential downsides so you can make an informed choice. Finally, we'll introduce you to MarketerHire—a more affordable and reliable alternative to agencies that lets you hire elite social media experts and other marketers quickly.

What Does a Social Media Marketing Agency Do? Social media marketing involves using social media platforms to connect with your target audience and promote your business. Social media marketing agencies help build, maintain, and scale your social media presence through strategy development, content creation, community management, paid social ads, performance monitoring and reporting, and influencer marketing.

The 11 agencies covered include: MarketerHire (a hiring platform connecting businesses with vetted social media experts), Sociallyin (award-winning agency with clients like Samsung and Nikon), Sculpt (specializing in B2B social media marketing), LYFE Marketing (working with thousands of companies across 12+ industries), Socialistics (youngest agency with U.S. Air Force case study), Onya (five-step personalized approach), Our Own Brand (UK-based, women-owned agency with social responsibility focus), Volterra (Canadian agency with 15+ years experience), Little Media Agency (UK-based with global clientele), Ernst Media (boutique U.S. agency with 15+ years experience), and Firebelly Marketing (longest-standing agency established in 2001, specializing in food and beverage).
with: Billions of people are active on social media today, and many of them use it to research brands and make buying decisions.
To help you choose the best social media marketing agency for your business, we've put together a list of 11 top-rated options.
While MarketerHire isn't a traditional social media marketing agency, it serves as a powerful solution for businesses seeking top-notch social media expertise.
Social media marketing agencies help build, maintain, and scale your social media presence through various services.
With over 30,000 successful matches and clients such as Lyft and Forbes, MarketerHire is a leader in marketing-focused recruitment.
